text:
is an Underground companion of Levi, Furlan Church, and Isabel Magnolia.

Appearance

He is a tall man who wears a red vest with a white t-shirt under it. Just like Furlan, he wears brown long boots with dark green pants.

Personality

He is usually a calm and considerate person to other people living in the Underground city.

Story

A Choice with No Regrets: Part One

Yan is one of the underground companions who get paid by Furlan Church. Since Furlan knows well that Yan needs more money for his leg treatments, he gives Yan more money than usual, which surprises Yan.

Later, Yan is moved to a hospital within Wall Sina so his leg can get properly treated. Nicholas Lovof sent him to the hospital, so Levi's squad would cooperate without complaints.

Relationship

Furlan Church - He thanked Furlan for giving him extra money for his leg injuries.
Levi - Levi's decision to help Lovof helped Yan get properly treated in the Wall Sina's hospital.
